alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be assessed for safety by SFA. Applies to all food sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only SFA-assessed additives are permitted. Verification required using the Food Additives Search tool or the List of Permitted Food Additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Unpermitted Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of an unpermitted additive.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (Incidental Constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. Applies to all food sold in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. Food businesses must ensure contaminants are within specified limits based on laboratory tests.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary Drug Residues (Diethylstibestrol, Hexoestrol, Dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Prohibits import or sale of meat and any food derived from meat containing these specific compounds.

alerts.title: Modified: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Ingredients and Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. New: Must be declared on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Codex establishes maximum levels (MLs) and guideline levels for contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants in food and feed. These levels are legally permitted concentrations.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in Spices
alerts.details: New: Follow Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices. This Code of Practice provides guidance for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxin contamination specifically in spices.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Regulations for food additives, including permitted uses and limits, are established by MHLW.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Specifications and Standards
alerts.details: New: Compliance with Specifications and Standards. This document contains detailed specifications and standards for various aspects of food, including permitted additives, contaminant limits, and potentially microbiological criteria. Verification is required.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against official specifications and standards.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: New: Compliance with Positive List System. The Positive List System specifies maximum residue limits for agricultural chemicals in food.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific guidelines for handling food contaminated by radioactivity are issued by MHLW.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Agricultural Chemical Residues
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against the Positive List System.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (general)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against official specifications and standards.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Contaminant Limits - Radioactivity
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against guidelines for handling contaminated food.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Basic Principles of Food Safety
alerts.details: New: Compliance with Food Safety Basic Law. This law establishes the basic principles for ensuring food safety in Japan. Compliance with its principles and derived regulations is required.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - General Food Safety and Hygiene
alerts.details: New: Compliance with Food Sanitation Law. This foundational law governs all aspects of food sanitation in Japan, including standards for ingredients, additives, contaminants, and labeling. Specific requirements must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Nutrition Labeling, Health Claims, Special Dietary Uses
alerts.details: New: Compliance with MHLW regulations. Specific requirements for labeling of nutrition, health claims, and food for special dietary uses must be verified.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: Old: Verification required for specific nutrition labeling requirements.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Microbiology Limits - Microbiological standards
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against official specifications and standards.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Class II Chemical Preservatives (multiple)
alerts.details: New: Use calculation tool for permitted levels. Applies if two or more Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid or benzoic acid) are used.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food Additive Limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Different limits apply depending on the additive and food product type. Refer to 'Guidance Information on Requirements for Use of Food Additives' and SFA's Legislation.
